launchInputs.label: Final Deadline
launchInputs.notes: All launch-critical content, pages, workflows, tracking, and webinar delivery assets must be ready by this date

launchInputs.label: Target Webinar Date
launchInputs.notes: Hard deadline for the July 30 Finding Winners webinar launch

launchInputs.label: Paid Ads Start
launchInputs.notes: Only after pages, tracking, emails, and GHL workflows are tested

launchInputs.label: Primary CRM
launchInputs.notes: Source of truth for leads, segmentation, workflows, and reporting

launchInputs.label: Webinar Platform
launchInputs.notes: Join links, calendar, platform reminders, attendance data

milestones.milestone: Funnel, domain structure, GHL pipeline approved
milestones.notes: Foundation complete before building Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-10.

milestones.milestone: Registration path works from page to GHL to BigMarker
milestones.notes: No paid traffic before this Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-12.

milestones.milestone: Registration confirmation and pre-webinar nurture built
milestones.notes: Email is a top priority Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-15.

milestones.milestone: Oren Working Group exoskeleton exists in GHL
milestones.notes: Application, pipeline, onboarding map Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-18.

milestones.milestone: Tracking and reporting ready before traffic
milestones.notes: GTM, GA4, Meta, GHL source data Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-20.
Social, static ads, scripts Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-23.
Warm list and organic push Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-25.
Optimize only after enough data Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-28.
Segment leads immediately after webinar Deadline checkpoint: 2026-07-30.

plan.Action Steps: Map traffic source > Finding Winners page > GHL > BigMarker > nurture > webinar > OWG > investor conversation.
Confirm roles for intersectioncapital.com/finding-winners, orenworkinggroup.com, and Orenklaff.com.
Review email sending domain, users, calendars, pipelines, custom fields, forms, automations, and reporting access.
Create draft stages from New Lead through Registered, Attended, Hand Raise, OWG Member, Investor Conversation, Qualified Investor.
UTM fields, attendance, hand raise, OWG interest, owners
Create form with first name, last name, email, phone, SMS consent, source tracking fields.
Draft hero, what they learn, Oren bio, who it's for, details, form, credibility, FAQ, CTA.
Approve funnel, domain structure, CRM stages, fields, tags, and LP wireframe direction.
Build simple HTML/Vercel page
Build You're In page with webinar time, next steps, calendar prompt, social share prompt.
Connect form submit to contact creation, tags, pipeline stage, and UTM/source capture.
Create webinar title, date/time, presenter info, join settings, reminders, calendar functionality.
Select one primary path: GHL form to BigMarker or BigMarker embed to GHL. Test sync.
Test LP > registration > GHL contact > BigMarker registration > confirmation page > tags/source fields.
plan.Notes: No paid traffic before this works.

plan.Action Steps: Map registration confirmation, nurture, invite, BigMarker reminders, no-show, attended, hand raise, OWG onboarding.
Create reusable template with header, footer, CTA button, compliance footer, merge fields.
Oren drafts; Jayson loads. Confirm expectations and BigMarker join details.
Draft credibility email and what-attendees-will-learn email.
Draft key insight teaser and final attendance push.
Load all four nurture emails into GHL with simple timing and suppression rules.
Document price, ideal member, benefits, meeting cadence, portal access, investment access, and application flow.
Create simple application/interest page; prioritize CTA and form over portal polish.
Set stages: Interested, Application Started, Submitted, Call Needed, Approved, Paid, Onboarded.
Tag high-intent contacts, move stage, notify team, create task, send immediate follow-up.
Missed webinar 3 emails, , continued nurture.
Send recap, fit email, and application reminder to attendees who do not apply.
Outline welcome, community access, weekly meeting details, resources, first-week success plan.
Install tracking on Finding Winners page and confirmation page.
Track page view, registration submit, confirmation page view, application click, application submit.
Define UTM source, medium, campaign, content, audience naming convention.
Views for registrations by source, attendees, no-shows, hand raises, applications, calls, members, investor conversations.
Submit test registrations from email, LinkedIn, Meta, and direct. Confirm source data flows into GHL.
Create simple daily report for spend, visitors, registrations, CPR, source, show rate, hand raises, applications.
Test LP, form, confirmation, GHL workflow, BigMarker registration, reminders, tags, source tracking, application CTA.
Plan LinkedIn/social problem posts, insight posts, story posts, invites, and last-chance posts.
Create four angles: miss winners, Oren evaluation, non-obvious deals, what OWG sees early.
Create 2-4 simple static ads using approved angles. Avoid overproduction.
Write 15 sec, 30 sec, and 60 sec scripts with one problem and one CTA each.
Record simple videos with clean audio. Prioritize clarity over production value.
Create Meta campaigns, cold audience, retargeting, and conversion settings in draft mode.
Approve ad angles, static ads, video scripts, and social calendar. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Send LP to internal test group; fix copy, mobile, form, and tracking issues. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Send webinar announcement to warm list. Keep CTA clear and suppress registrants afterward. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Publish first LinkedIn/social post from Oren and company accounts; CTA to Finding Winners page. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Confirm registrants flow correctly, sources populate, and duplicate contacts are not created. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Send problem/opportunity email to non-registrants only. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Reach partners, friendly investors, podcast contacts, warm network, and existing community members. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Review registrations, LP CVR, email clicks, broken links, common questions, and lead quality. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Launch ads at controlled budget after confirming pixel and GHL source tracking. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Check spend, CTR, CPC, LP conversion, CPR, and lead quality. Do not overreact too early. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Send educational insight email to non-registrants with one clear CTA. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Share one useful idea from the webinar without giving away everything. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
If conversion is weak, adjust headline, CTA, or hero. Do not redesign the page. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Pause obvious underperformers and push budget to best creative/audience combinations. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Report registrations, source breakdown, CPR, page CVR, email performance, and projected final registrations. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Send social-proof/last-chance invite to non-registrants only. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
Publish final post: what will be covered, who should attend, why to join live. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
plan.Deliverable: Final organic post live / July 30 ready

plan.Action Steps: Check BigMarker reminders, join links, GHL workflows, hand-raise forms, OWG page, tracking, replay plan, notifications. Package for July 30 deadline review and owner sign-off.
plan.Deliverable: Final systems QA passed / July 30 ready

plan.Action Steps: Run the July 30 webinar, monitor registration, delivery, attendance, hand raises, GHL segmentation, and post-webinar workflow triggers.
plan.Deliverable: July 30 webinar complete and lead segments triggered

workflows.Primary Actions: Create/update contact; add webinar/date/source tags; capture UTMs; move to Webinar Registered; send confirmation; register/sync to BigMarker.
workflows.Success Check: Test contact appears in GHL and BigMarker with correct source

workflows.Primary Actions: Send nurture emails; maintain event link visibility; keep registrants suppressed from non-registrant invites.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Stop after webinar date or if unsubscribed
workflows.Success Check: All four emails loaded and timing works
workflows.Notes: Use GHL for nurture; BigMarker for join reminders.

workflows.Trigger: Warm list segment and not registered
workflows.Primary Actions: Send invite emails; suppress registrants; tag clicks; update source/interest fields when possible.
workflows.Success Check: No registered contacts receive invite reminders

workflows.Primary Actions: BigMarker sends 1 day, 1 hour, 10 minute reminders with join/calendar links.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Do not duplicate with heavy GHL reminders
workflows.Success Check: Test registrant receives BigMarker join link

workflows.Primary Actions: Send replay or sorry-we-missed-you; include soft OWG CTA; continue nurture.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Exit if applies or books a call

workflows.Trigger: Attended but no application, click, or hand raise
workflows.Primary Actions: Send recap, resources, OWG fit email, and application reminder.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Exit if applies, hand raises, or books call
workflows.Success Check: Attendees get correct sequence only once

workflows.Trigger: Hand raise, application click, application submit, or strong intent action
workflows.Primary Actions: Notify team; create task; assign owner; move stage; send immediate next-step email.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Exit after assigned and next step completed

workflows.Primary Actions: Send welcome, portal/community access, weekly meeting details, resources, first-week plan; create personal welcome task.
workflows.Success Check: Member receives access and next steps
workflows.Notes: Portal can be simple at launch.

workflows.Trigger: $100K+ check size, investment interest, or direct request
workflows.Primary Actions: Move to Investor Conversation; notify Oren/team; create priority task; send appropriate next-step email.
workflows.Suppress / Exit Rules: Exit after qualified, closed, or lost
workflows.Success Check: High-value leads do not sit unassigned
workflows.Notes: Keep separate from generic OWG leads.

messaging.title: Finding Winners — Messaging & Positioning Guide
messaging.subtitle: Every ad, landing page, and email must answer the five questions below. Use the 'One Promise' as your headline anchor.
messaging.promiseTitle: ⭐ THE ONE PROMISE (Use as headline on LP and in every ad)
messaging.promise: "Learn how accredited investors access private opportunities that are typically unavailable to individual investors."
messaging.promiseNotes: Everything else — headlines, bullets, testimonials, ad copy — exists only to support and prove this promise. Do not lead with Oren's bio or the group name.

sections.title: ❓ Q1 — WHAT EXACTLY IS FINDING WINNERS?

items.guidance: Finding Winners is a free live webinar where Oren Klaff reveals the framework he and his network use to identify high-upside private investment opportunities before they're available to the general public.
items.placement: Use this verbatim on the LP above the fold

items.guidance: It is NOT a pitch for a fund, NOT a general investing seminar, and NOT a teaser for a course. Every asset should make this clear.
Accredited investors ($1M+ net worth or $200K+ income) who are actively looking for private deal flow and are frustrated that the best opportunities go to insiders.
items.placement: Use in ad targeting AND in LP copy

items.guidance: High-earning professionals and entrepreneurs who are accredited but have not yet invested privately — they need education AND access.
Retail investors, people looking for stock picks, or anyone seeking a passive 'set and forget' product. Qualify early to protect attendance quality.
The criteria Oren and his network use to evaluate whether a private deal is worth pursuing — before doing any deep due diligence.
How to get access to deal flow that never appears on platforms like AngelList or Fundrise — the network-based sourcing model.
What separates investors who see outsized returns from those who get average outcomes — it's not capital size, it's information timing.
The specific next step after the webinar — how the Oren Working Group (OWG) provides ongoing deal access and investor community.
items.placement: LP bullet point #4 / transition to CTA

sections.title: ❓ Q4 — WHAT IS THE NEXT STEP AFTER THE WEBINAR?

items.guidance: Apply to join the Oren Working Group — a curated investor community that provides ongoing private deal flow, Oren's direct evaluation, and group diligence.
items.placement: Must be stated clearly during webinar AND on slide

items.guidance: Watch the replay and apply within 48 hours. Create urgency without false scarcity.
Screened call with Oren or team → approval → access to OWG deal flow and community.

sections.title: ❓ Q5 — WHY SHOULD THEY BELIEVE YOU? (Credibility layer)

items.guidance: Oren Klaff has raised over $400M in private capital and is the author of Pitch Anything and Flip the Script — the standard texts used by deal professionals and investors.
items.placement: LP bio section — keep it short

items.guidance: Include 1–2 short testimonials from past webinar attendees or OWG members who found specific deals. Real names or 'Accredited investor, [city]' if anonymous.
Every claim needs a number or a name. 'Investors like you have used this to...' is weak. '$3.2M deployed by OWG members in 2024' is strong.
items.placement: Review all LP copy for vague claims

dailyRegistrations.title: Finding Winners — Daily Launch Dashboard
dailyRegistrations.subtitle: Enter the date in row 4 for each day column, then fill in daily numbers. Blue = input. Formulas auto-calculate CPR, CVR & running totals.

operatingRules.rule: GHL and landing page development come first; the funnel cannot be scaled until form, CRM, and email routing work.
BigMarker should handle join links, calendar links, and platform reminders; GHL should manage segmentation, nurture, and sales follow-up.
Do not make Orenklaff.com or a perfect OWG portal a launch blocker. Build the minimum viable exoskeleton first.
Before meaningful registration volume, daily monitoring is more useful than deep reporting meetings.
If behind pace after Day 56: send another warm-list email, increase partner/social pushes, and only scale paid ads that are converting.
